element_introduction_order.mastery_context: basic acceleration and steering without obstacles
managing engine temperature gauge to avoid overheating while maintaining speed advantage
competing for position and sub-goal checkpoints; losing girlfriend if opponent reaches checkpoint first
either outrunning with turbo boost or ramming off-road into environmental objects
strategic choice between Hi-Power Engine, Special Turbo, or Super Grip Tires to customize vehicle attributes
maintaining position advantage over CPU to keep girlfriend in player's car; bonus points and kiss animation if maintained through final checkpoint

typical_relief_triggers: turbo boost cooldown allowing speed recovery
typical_tension_triggers: CPU opponent closing distance or reaching checkpoint first
time pressure toward Los Angeles destination
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: continuous escalating pressure: linear single-path race from NYC to LA with periodic relief at checkpoints but constant CPU rivalry and turbo management tension

difficulty_curve.early_game: introductory: basic vehicle control and turbo boost mechanics without significant obstacles
difficulty_curve.mid_game: escalating: police cars introduced, CPU opponent becomes aggressive, upgrade choices provide strategic complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: climactic: sustained competition with CPU, continuous police interference, resource management (turbo temperature) becomes critical
notable_spikes: first police car encounter requiring ramming or evasion
CPU opponent reaching sub-goal before player and taking girlfriend
final checkpoint approach with accumulated difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Game consists of single predetermined path from New York City to Los Angeles divided into segments of approximately 4 cities each, culminating in sub-goal checkpoints where upgrades are available. No branching routes.
At each sub-goal checkpoint, CPU opponent's arrival order determines game state changes. If CPU reaches first, girlfriend transfers to opponent's car, raising stakes for next segment.
Police cars periodically spawn during race segments and must be either outrun via turbo boost or physically rammed off-road into environmental obstacles to clear the path.
